caption: The Pleven medicine entrance exam focuses on Biology and Chemistry. That can suit students whose overall CAO points were the problem but whose science foundation is stronger. It still needs proper preparation — it is not guaranteed or automatic entry. Comment DOCTOR and I'll send you the free 15-minute call link. No pitch, no pressure.
note: FALLBACK ONLY. Primary is Zernio at 19:00 Irish (server-side). This fires at 19:20 only if Zernio did not post; run_queue.py checks the live feed first and deletes this entry if it did.
